title: Are the priests living ghosts of the past, re-enacting and thus memorializing (instructing/ Torah-ing) of Israel's and Yahweh's interactions? are they re-enacting these things (and reenacting creation order movements/actions/cycles) on a "course" that is completing and cycling (circa tameem and ureem ) centered on fullness (sheva/ sevenness) of cycles and timelines centered on Shabbat?
author: joshualinog
excerpt: Are the priests living ghosts of the past, re-enacting and thus memorializing (instructing/ Torah-ing) of Israel's and Yahweh's interactions? are they re-enacting these things (and reenacting creation
content:
Are the priests living ghosts of the past, re-enacting and thus memorializing (instructing/ Torah-ing) of Israel's and Yahweh's interactions? are they re-enacting these things (and reenacting creation order movements/actions/cycles) on a "course" that is completing and cycling (circa tameem and ureem ) centered on fullness (sheva/ sevenness) of cycles and timelines centered on Shabbat?

Are they the priests (your disciples) entrusted with this great honor of being entrusted with instructing training your people that you came down to save and remove from slavery and death and draw to yourself all of them (the Kosmos the whole world ) ?
